principal: Tenant-local agent identity created from an agent identity blueprint
delegated_actor: Interactive flow represents the user as subject and the agent identity as actor
credential_strategy: Blueprint uses federation or protected credentials to acquire tokens on behalf of credential-less agent identities
audience_binding: Microsoft identity platform access-token audience and resource permissions
revocation: Disable the agent identity or revoke grants and blueprint-scoped access
audit: Correlate Entra agent sign-ins, identity/sponsor metadata, task_id, and application audit_id
limitations: Agent identities remain single-tenant even when a blueprint is multitenant
Product availability, licensing, roles, and preview behavior must be checked before a live lab
